Operation 'filterMeals' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate what filtering options are available. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance to AI agents about the operation's purpose, expected inputs, or outputs. Enhanced version specifies the three main filter types (category, cuisine, ingredient), clarifies that one filter is used per request, describes the response structure, and explains practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.summary_suggestion: Filter meals by category, cuisine, or ingredient
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of meals filtered by specified criteria. Supports filtering by meal category (e.g., Seafood, Vegetarian), cuisine area (e.g., Italian, Chinese), or main ingredient. Accepts one filter parameter per request. Returns an array of meal objects containing meal ID, name, thumbnail image, and other basic meal information. Useful for discovering meals based on dietary preferences or ingredient availability.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate what filtering options are available. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance to AI agents about the operation's purpose, expected inputs, or outputs. Enhanced version specifies the three main filter types (category, cuisine, ingredient), clarifies that one filter is used per request, describes the response structure, and explains practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'searchMeals' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about search parameters (name or ingredient), expected return format, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Search meals by name or ingredient
data.description_suggestion: Search the meal database by meal name or ingredient. Accepts either a meal name or ingredient as a search parameter. Returns a list of matching meals with basic details including ID, name, thumbnail image, and category. Useful for discovering meals based on available ingredients or meal preferences.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about search parameters (name or ingredient), expected return format, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Lookup full meal details by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve complete meal details by meal ID. Accepts a meal ID as input parameter. Returns the full Meal object including all 33 properties: recipe ingredients, measurements, cooking instructions, category, area of origin, tags, and media URLs. Use this after identifying a meal via search to get comprehensive recipe information.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing entirely. Added details about input parameter, comprehensive output structure, and context for when to use this operation in a workflow.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of available options for filtering meals. Accepts one of three parameters: 'c' for categories, 'a' for areas/cuisines, or 'i' for ingredients.
